details.message: reports/board/ directory was missing at scan time. Created during this governance run. All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) present. reports/audit/ present.

moltbot/ directory exists as a top-level code directory with active Python files (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). Per governance contract, Moltbot code should not be present in the repo.
Moltbot/Clawdbot references found in code/config files (excluding docs/audit that document removal).
